name: Grep
description: A powerful search tool built on ripgrep. Supports full regex syntax. Filter files with glob parameter or type parameter. Output modes: "content" shows matching lines, "files_with_matches" shows only file paths (default), "count" shows match counts.

-A.description: Number of lines to show after each match (rg -A). Requires output_mode: "content".

-B.description: Number of lines to show before each match (rg -B). Requires output_mode: "content".

-n.description: Show line numbers in output (rg -n). Requires output_mode: "content". Defaults to true.

context.description: Number of lines to show before and after each match (rg -C). Requires output_mode: "content".

glob.description: Glob pattern to filter files (e.g. "*.js", "*.{ts,tsx}") - maps to rg --glob

head_limit.description: Limit output to first N lines/entries. Defaults to 0 (unlimited).

multiline.description: Enable multiline mode where . matches newlines (rg -U --multiline-dotall). Default: false.

offset.description: Skip first N lines/entries before applying head_limit. Defaults to 0.

path.description: File or directory to search in (rg PATH). Defaults to current working directory.

pattern.description: The regular expression pattern to search for in file contents

type.description: File type to search (rg --type). Common types: js, py, rust, go, java, etc.
